# Phase 7 Governance Constitution Plan

This planning note records Phase 7.8 institutional runtime governance constitution architecture. It is read-only and non-executing.

## Scope

- constitutional governance doctrine
- immutable governance truths
- authority separation doctrine
- governance non-bypass guarantees
- constitutional fail-closed doctrine
- constitutional amendment governance
- constitutional auditability
- institutional survivability doctrine
- long-horizon governance durability
- constitution blockers and escalation

## Out Of Scope

- runtime authorization
- automated governance
- deployment authorization
- execution approval systems
- autonomous governance
- runtime activation
- provider activation
- executable workflows
- constitutional execution engines
- machine-authorized governance

## Completion Criteria

- Governance constitution planning remains subordinate to human governance review.
- Immutable truths cannot authorize execution.
- Authority separation doctrine remains deterministic.
- Amendment governance fails closed under uncertainty.
- Non-bypass guarantees remain explicit.
- Runtime-disabled truth remains preserved.
